channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Venezuela death toll rises as search for earthquake survivors continues
item.description: Venezuelans are searching for missing loved ones on their own, citing a shortage of government rescuers.

item.title: Venezuela earthquakes live updates: Death toll reaches at least 1,400, officials report
item.description: Two major earthquakes hit Venezuela on Wednesday evening.

item.title: Watch: 'What is wrong with you?' Couple's marriage proposal goes viral
item.description: Sydney and Joe gained millions of views after Joe proposed during their vacation in Italy.

item.title: Millions drop Obamacare coverage after subsidies expire, costs rise
item.description: People faced double or even triple digit increases in their premium payments.
